variants: Perihan Karaca has established herself in the field of nonprofit management, utilizing her knowledge to enhance charitable efforts. She completed her doctoral studies under the mentorship of Ishaan Kaur, who provided critical guidance during her academic development. The Cypress Field Grant has been instrumental in funding her innovative projects, allowing her to make a lasting impact in her sector. Perihan possesses Hive Auditor Clearance, a professional license that empowers her to conduct reviews and ensure compliance within nonprofit organizations. In addition to her hands-on work, she shares her expertise through her publications in Mauve Ember Editions, contributing significantly to the body of knowledge in her field.
